prompt: Generate an MRI image of a brain with a visible tumor, using the heatmap as reference for tumor location.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic MRI image of a human brain, featuring a clearly visible brain tumor. The tumor's precise location and general shape should be guided by the prominent red and orange heatmap region in the upper-left quadrant of image 1. The final output should present a detailed axial view of the brain with the integrated tumor, consistent with a diagnostic medical MRI scan, without any heatmap or text overlays.
objects: Axial view of a human brain
Brain tumor in the upper-left quadrant
Detailed internal brain structures (e.g., grey matter, white matter, ventricles)
Diagnostic medical MRI scan visual style
